subcodes.first_line: O My brother! Hearken unto that which thy Lord counseleth thee through the pen of thy brother, according to that which God hath revealed from the pure essence of His holy Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اخی اسمع ما یوصیک به ربک من قلم اخیک بما اوحی الله من ساذج وحیه المقدس
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @generosity [kirama], @servitude; submission to God; repentance
